phase-1.title: USDC → Aave V3 on Base
phase-1.what: Vault pulls USDC, supplies to Aave V3 Pool, aTokens accrue. Subscription router can deposit too.
phase-1.shane_note: Is this set up or is it a separate step? — Both, depending on layer.
phase-1.tech:
Contract: deposit() built + tested
Tests: 6 deposit tests pass
Onramp: Phase 3 (Coinbase Onramp wire-up)

phase-1.title: 90-day inactivity trigger
phase-1.what: Owner pings to prove alive. 90 days silence → heir can inherit. Threshold immutable at deploy, min 7-day floor.
phase-1.shane_note: Should add in-depth steps before anything else fires off because choices may be given.
phase-1.tech:
Contract: ping() + inherit() + OwnerStillActive error
Tests: Reverts before threshold, succeeds after, ping-resets-clock
choices: Threshold length at deploy (7d to unlimited)

phase-1.title: RC 1.02 fires — funds to heir
phase-1.what: After threshold, beneficiary calls inherit(). Entire aToken position withdraws to heir. Vault locks forever.
phase-1.shane_note: Big measures to offer our product to family for years — creating users' own Legacy.
phase-1.tech:
Contract: inherit() (CEI, ReentrancyGuard)
RC code: 1.02 Heir Transfer
One-shot: inherited=true blocks re-entry
choices: One-click new vault for THEIR heirs (Founding Family discount)
First LegacyAI session free as part of inheritance

phase-1.title: Non-custodial — only key holds
phase-1.what: No admin keys. No backdoor. Shane / Angel Cloud / Pulsar cannot move user funds.
phase-1.shane_note: Mourning then rejoicing — family meets LegacyAI at the same time the vault transfers.

phase-1.title: Transparent cost basis on-chain
phase-1.what: Every Deposited / Pinged / Inherited event lives on-chain forever.
phase-1.shane_note: Where we can offer routes based on User preferences — CPA / family digest / charity / pure privacy.

phase-1.title: Skips probate delays
phase-1.what: Heir calls inherit() — funds transfer same block. No 9-month estate, no court queue.

phase-1.title: Pseudonymous (wallet-addressed)
phase-1.what: Vault owned by wallet, not name. Chain shows balances but never identities.

phase-1.title: Cryptographic proof
phase-1.what: Every tx signed by caller's private key. ECDSA secp256k1.

phase-1.title: Foundry test suite — 33/33 GREEN
phase-1.what: Run on gulfshores with forge 1.7.1 + solc 0.8.24. Suite completed ~90ms. Zero failures.
phase-1.tech:
Tests: 33 pass / 0 fail / 0 skip
Fuzz: 3000 cases pass
Invariant: heartbeat-monotonic pass

phase-1.title: inherit() local variable name
phase-1.what: Renamed inherit() local var silenceDuration → elapsed to avoid shadowing the external view function. Behavior unchanged, tests still 33/33 green.

phase-1.title: block.timestamp lint documented as accepted
phase-1.what: forge-lint flagged block-timestamp. Base L2 ~2s drift vs 90-day threshold = 0.0000003% manipulation window. Acknowledged in NatSpec + threat model.

phase-2.title: Conditional Distribution
phase-2.what: Heirs receive at age 25, graduation, marriage, home purchase. Oracle-verified.

phase-2.title: Drip Distribution Schedule
phase-2.what: Releases over months/years instead of lump sum. Sablier-style streaming.

phase-2.title: Multi-Gen / Skip-Generation
phase-2.what: Multiple beneficiaries with split percentages. Or beneficiary = Safe wallet for 3-of-5 sons multi-sig.

phase-2.title: Care for Dependent Heirs
phase-2.what: Guardian co-sign + paced releases for minors / heirs who can't manage funds.

phase-2.title: Income Stream (Monthly)
phase-2.what: Same streaming pattern, monthly cadence presentation.

phase-2.title: Heir Onboarding Wizard
phase-2.what: At inherit(), guided dapp flow: cash out OR open YOUR OWN LegacyVault.

phase-2.title: Chainlink Automation hook
phase-2.what: Auto-calls inherit() at 90-day mark, ~$5/yr per vault.

phase-2.title: 30-day grace + Founding Family discount
phase-2.what: Heir who re-vaults inside 30 days keeps original Founding Member pricing forever.

phase-2.title: LegacyAI inheritance welcome
phase-2.what: Heir's first session with deceased's TheirNameBrain free as part of inheritance flow.
phase-2.shane_note: A YourLegacy inheritance is the chance to meet the person you lost.

open-removed.title: Lawyer item #9 — Aspirational vs Phase 1 cards
open-removed.what: Page lists ~22 benefits, contract delivers ~4. Is "Designed to deliver" softening enough?

open-removed.title: Lawyer item #10 — Digital-self inheritance
open-removed.what: Page promises encrypted data + photos + LegacyAI inherit alongside funds. Distinct legal treatment?

open-removed.title: Cluster repo drift fix — Pi-authoritative
open-removed.what: Pi is single writer to GitHub. Other nodes rsync to Pi inbox; Pi commits + pushes.

open-removed.title: Unified cockpit — one big computer
open-removed.what: 3 layers: Windows Terminal panes, Mega Dashboard expansion, tmux fleet sync.

open-removed.title: Path B — Custodian-only architecture
open-removed.why_removed: Too slow, too regulated for solo builder. Non-custodial (Path A) ships first; custodian rails added in v2 once revenue funds compliance.

open-removed.title: Open WebUI on cluster
open-removed.why_removed: Replaced by Claude API + Mega Dashboard direct integration. Port 3000 reclaimed.

open-removed.title: Ollama on Pi cluster
open-removed.why_removed: RAM-hungry on Pi, latency bad on dispatch use cases. Replaced with Claude Haiku via API. Saved 5.5GB RAM.

phase-1.title: ML-KEM-768 (CRYSTALS-Kyber)
phase-1.what: NIST-approved lattice-based KEM via liboqs-python v0.15.0.

phase-1.title: HybridEncryptor (ML-KEM → HKDF → AES-256-GCM)
phase-1.what: End-to-end hybrid PQC encryption.

phase-1.title: MetaMask JWT auth
phase-1.what: Wallet signs nonce → 24h JWT for user-facing API.

phase-1.title: Internal service key
phase-1.what: Bearer shanebrain-internal-2026 for MCP tools + scripts.

phase-1.title: Stripe billing (live mode)
phase-1.what: Three tiers: Legacy $10.99, Sentinel $24.99, Guild $49.99/mo.

phase-1.title: /security page
phase-1.what: Q-Day countdown, YourLegacy waitlist, RSA vs ML-KEM demo. Live at sentinel.shanebrain.cloud/security.
